data.name: I Rizzed Up a Femboy
data.detailed_description:
Male on Femboy

UNVEILED: Steamy Chat Logs between a Guy and a Femboy!

How hot can a digital fling get? Can mere words ignite enough fire to drive two strangers into a frenzy of self-pleasure? Do you crave the soft, silent tease—or does raw, filthy dirty talk dripping with sin set loose the wild, desperate slut buried deep within?

Brace yourself for what’s next: explicit, shameless, and deliciously depraved. A no-holds-barred chat so nasty it’ll leave you blushing and breathless—culminating in both sides erupting in a mind-blowing, load-drenching finish! 💦

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

  • Choose to be top or bottom

  • H-Scenes

  • ~3K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.
